subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Desired One, Who is worthy and befitting of all glorification, through Whose sacred Will complete fellowship hath been established between hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که باراده مقدسه اش الفت تمام مابین افئده و
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @consultation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
